name: hezpo-website-ops
description: Reusable Codex workflows for Hezpo website audits, product page updates, SEO content, and e-commerce conversion checks.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and optimize Hezpo website workflows.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex workflows for Hezpo website audits, product page updates, SEO content, image integration, WhatsApp inquiry checks, and Shopee/TikTok conversion support without touching secrets or live seller accounts.
defaultPrompt: Use Hezpo Website Ops to audit the homepage with Chrome DevTools and produce a markdown report.
Use Hezpo Website Ops to add a verified product page and run npm run build.
Use Hezpo Website Ops to improve Malaysia-market SEO copy without making unverified product claims.
